requirements.title: User Authentication
requirements.description: User can login using email and password.

requirements.title: Post-Login Navigation
requirements.description: After successful login user lands on dashboard.

acceptance_criteria.description: System accepts valid email format and password with at least 8 characters.
System rejects login attempts with invalid email formats.
System rejects login attempts with passwords shorter than 8 characters.
Successful authentication redirects the user to the dashboard page.

positive_scenarios.title: Successful Login
steps: Enter password with 8 or more characters
positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is redirected to the dashboard.

negative_scenarios.title: Login with invalid email format
steps: Enter email without @ symbol or domain
negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is denied and error message is displayed.

negative_scenarios.title: Login with short password
negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is denied and error message is displayed.

boundary_scenarios.title: Login with minimum password length
boundary_scenarios.expected_result: User is successfully logged in and redirected to the dashboard.
